files.description: Clamp popupWidth/popupHeight to screen size. Was hardcoded 560x640; overflowed this device's 540-logical-px-wide screen (niri output scale 2 on a 1080x1240 panel), slicing the rightmost view-mode toggle icon in half.

Clamp popupWidth/popupHeight to screen size. Was hardcoded 700-736 wide with no clamp; overflowed the same 540-logical-px screen, clipping the profile card's text and pushing the Media card fully off-screen.

Fix invalid foot terminal color template: [colors-dark] section renamed to [colors] (foot only recognizes [colors]), cursor color moved to its own [cursor] section, dim-blend-towards option dropped (doesn't exist in foot 1.21.0).
